THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRINNER, THOMAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 666 ELLIS STREET, APT. 306, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $732.39 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $732.39, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
